resources.string: %1$s is at %2$d%% media volume. Its most recent sampled digital peak is %3$.1f dBFS; the risk threshold is %4$d dBFS (%5$s). Continue playback?
%1$s is at %2$d%% media volume. No current PCM peak sample is available; its digital output ceiling can reach %3$.1f dBFS, with a risk threshold of %4$d dBFS (%5$s). Continue playback?
This is a digital-output estimate, not an ear-level dB SPL measurement. The DAC output and headphone sensitivity are not calibrated.
Start playback to enable device audio effects
This device or audio session does not support the equalizer
This device or audio session does not support loudness enhancement
Playback URL is invalid. Please sign in again or switch audio quality and retry.
Network connection failed. Check your connection and try again.
Sign-in is required before this track can be played.
Video audio information is currently unavailable.
Swipe left to decrease, right to increase
Sample lyrics: Spring breeze is not as good as you
Below Android 12 uses a low-cost effect and looks weaker
Replace translated lyrics with phonetics on the second line
This lyric has no phonetics, so it cannot be enabled
Swipe right to advance lyrics, swipe left to delay
Original info retrieved, please click save to apply
No lyrics available for this song
[00:00.00]Enter translated lyrics here\n[00:05.00]Supports LRC format\n[00:10.00]Format: [mm:ss.xx]Translation content
Auto fill info from search results
Enter the song name used for auto fill search
No cover is available to download
Grant storage permission before saving covers
No cover is available to preview
Pinch to zoom · Drag to explore
Tap favorite button in playlist details, or long press recommended playlists on home page
Some playlist items are still missing. Showing the tracks loaded so far.
The playlist is not fully loaded yet. Try again later or tap refresh.
Local playlists could not be initialized. Restart the app and try again.
Tap Follow on an artist page, and the artist will appear here
After importing local audio, songs are grouped by artist automatically
Try a playlist, artist, or song name
Try a name, source, artist, or song name
This name is reserved for \"%s\", please choose another name~
A playlist with this name already exists, please choose another name
No matching playlists or albums found
Try a name, ID, play count, or track count
No Bilibili favorites or collections loaded yet
Sign in to Bilibili to load created favorites, subscribed favorites, and saved collections
No matching favorites or collections found
Try a title, note, type name, or ID
Make sure YouTube is signed in, then the app will load playlists from your library
Long press a playlist to enter sorting mode, then drag the handle
No NetEase artist info is available for this song
Are you sure you want to clear all recent play history? This action cannot be undone.
Authorized folder scans only the selected folder and its subfolders. Global scan reads the device music library.
Invalid scan result. Kept the existing Local Files list.
No new local tracks to import
Selected tracks are already in the target playlist
Reading local titles, artists, and albums (%1$d/%2$d)
Reading local titles, artists, and albums
Are you sure you want to delete this playlist? This action cannot be undone!
Sync selected songs to NetEase Liked Songs?
Sync finished: total %1$d, added %2$d, existing %3$d, unsupported %4$d, failed %5$d
Favorites are empty. Nothing to sync.
Already synced to NetEase. Nothing to update.
This artist has no playable local songs
Select songs and tap download button
Are you sure you want to clear all download tasks? Queued and active downloads will be canceled, and downloaded files will not be deleted.
The remaining tasks are queued and waiting for a free download slot
Audio has been written; lyrics, covers, and metadata are being sorted
Network is switching, download will resume automatically
Are you sure you want to delete song "%s"? This action cannot be undone.
Saved with translated lyrics from API: %s
Grant audio read permission before scanning local music
Scan and confirm with the Bilibili app on your phone, then return to NeriPlayer immediately.
Scanned. Confirm sign-in on your phone
Sign-in was confirmed, but the Cookie was incomplete. Try again
The QR code is created by the Bilibili API. The app watches its status and saves cookies after confirmation.
NetEase is not signed in, search is unavailable
Sign in to NetEase to search
NetEase is not signed in, home search-based recommendations are unavailable
NetEase is not signed in, metadata completion is unavailable
Switch home recommendations and explore to YouTube Music
Hide YouTube entry points and stop related requests and background warmups when disabled
Tap refresh in the upper right to retry~
All home cards are hidden. Re-enable them in Settings.
Offline mode only shows Continue Playing. Nothing is available yet.
Discover more exciting videos on Bilibili
Explore requires a network connection and will be re-enabled automatically when the network is restored.
A saved Cookie was found, but it may be invalid. Tap to refresh it or sign out
No usable Cookie detected. Tap to sign in again or import one
A saved Cookie was found, but it may be invalid. Tap to refresh it or sign out
No usable Cookie detected. Tap to sign in again or import one
No usable YouTube / YouTube Music auth information was captured
Saved YouTube auth information was found, but it may be invalid. Tap to refresh it or sign out
No usable YouTube sign-in state detected. Tap to sign in again or import one
Search Bilibili automatically when a NetEase song is unavailable or only returns a preview clip
Scan and confirm with NetEase Cloud Music on your phone, then return to NeriPlayer immediately.
Scanned. Confirm sign-in on your phone
Sign-in was confirmed, but the Cookie was incomplete. Try again
The QR code is created by the NetEase API. The app watches its status and saves cookies after confirmation.
Opens NetEase QR login. After you scan and confirm, cookies are saved automatically. If it fails, use the web login fallback on the QR page.
Opens Bilibili QR login and saves cookies after confirmation. If it fails, use the web login fallback on the QR page.
A local Bilibili Cookie is already saved. You can sign out to clear it, or continue signing in to refresh the Cookie.
A local NetEase Cookie is already saved. You can sign out to clear it, or continue signing in to refresh the Cookie.
Tries to open music.youtube.com in the built-in web view and automatically reads cookies after sign-in.
Local YouTube auth information is already saved. You can sign out to clear it, or continue signing in to refresh auth.
Google may show \"This browser may not be secure\" or block sign-in entirely. If that happens, switch to the \"Cookie Import\" tab above.
Paste Cookie or browser request headers (must include Cookie)
Manage NetEase, Bili, and YouTube sign-in states
May need to restart app for best effect
Version, project home, and developer mode
Keep writing runtime logs even when debug mode is off
After the selected pause duration, remove the playback notification and stop the foreground playback service to reduce battery use. The queue and progress are kept.
Auto focus inputs and try to show the keyboard
You can hide any home card. Hide all cards to hide Home.
When internationalization is enabled, these toggles switch to YouTube Music home sections.
Control the Guess You Like song shelf.
Control the Daily Discover song shelf.
Control more YouTube Music recommendation and playlist sections.
Sign in to NetEase to enable Trending and Personal Radar.
Control cover, lyrics, and background display.
All home cards are hidden, so Home will disappear from the bottom bar.
Fade audio in when playback starts
Fade between tracks when moving to the next song
Finish current song when timer expires
When enabled, finish the current song before stopping after the countdown ends
Analyzes each track and smoothly compensates its loudness for more consistent volume between songs. Disabled during USB exclusive playback.

Uses the Media3 32-bit float pipeline for standard system output when the source is high-resolution. USB exclusive output is unaffected. Loudness normalization, balance, audio visualization, and app-side speed processing are bypassed. Restart the app to apply.
Adjust the left and right channel balance
Configure automatic source switching and fallback sources
Remember the current song position after restarting the app
Restore repeat and shuffle state after restarting the app
Pause playback when a Bluetooth device disconnects
Use direct exclusive output for USB DACs

USB exclusive output needs the foreground service and wake lock to keep running. To avoid screen-off limits, set NeriPlayer battery/background behavior to unrestricted or fully allowed in system settings.
Do not convert; use system playback
Try supported bit-depth/container variants; sample rate is not changed implicitly
Fall back when the device cannot use the source bit depth
Prefer the source rate, then try a compatible device rate
Fall back when the device cannot use the source channel count
Ask before playback at or above this estimate. Lower values are more conservative; caution does not interrupt playback.
The capability list omits %1$s; playback will still try it
The capability list omits %1$d-bit PCM; playback will still try it
Player PCM is being written directly to the USB audio endpoint
The current source is not player PCM
Connect a compatible USB DAC or headset to retry automatically
Permission is required for direct USB audio interface access
Exclusive will be tried during playback
This build keeps the original system playback path
Do not take audio focus so other apps can play
Take audio focus when the main screen opens and playback is idle, making headset controls more likely to target NeriPlayer
Sample lyrics: Last night the east wind blew
Songs, lyrics, and covers will be saved here
Avoid moving the download directory unless necessary. The app private folder usually performs better
Switch back to the app private download folder
Customize how downloaded songs are named when saved locally
Use TagLib to write embedded audio tags, lyrics, and cover after downloads complete; management metadata is still saved when off
Convert embedded audio tag lyrics to common LRC while keeping word-level lyrics for in-app playback
Controls how many song download tasks can run at the same time, up to 8
Avoid moving the download directory unless necessary. The app private folder usually performs better. Only switch to a custom folder when you really need it
Move your downloaded songs, lyrics, and covers to \"%1$s\"?
Songs, lyrics, and covers are being moved to the new folder
Cannot change the download directory while downloads are in progress
Language changed. App restart required for full effect.
Language changed. Restart the app to apply it completely.\n语言已更改，需要重启应用以完全生效。
Long press color or tap × to delete custom color
Dark mode, dynamic color, and accent colors
When dynamic color is off, this accent color is used. You can also save frequent colors to the palette.
Quickly switch light and dark mode.
When enabled, the app follows the system appearance automatically.
Switch the Material Kolor palette style for cover colors and custom accent colors.
Choose the Material color spec version. 2025 is more expressive, 2021 is more stable.
Balanced and close to Android dynamic color defaults.
Lower saturation for a calmer interface.
Brighter and more prominent primary colors.
More playful hue shifts for personalized themes.
Close to black, white, and gray.
Stays closer to the selected seed color.
Manually specify when not following system
Display the platform badge for the current song on the cover area
Controls whether the "Now Playing" title appears at the top of the player page
Keep screen on in Now Playing
Prevent the screen from timing out while the Now Playing page is open
Show current quality above progress bar
Shown above the progress bar; quality switching is available in More Options
Show a rounded dock container for the bottom toolbar on Now Playing
Shown above the progress bar, such as FLAC, AAC, or E-AC-3
Show audio spec above progress bar
Shown above the progress bar, including sample rate, bit depth, and bitrate
Use the current cover as the background of Now Playing
Enable audio-reactive motion in Now Playing
Enable animated background in Now Playing
Turn on Now Playing Dynamic Background first
Enable a more modern lyrics layout and motion, and prefer word-level lyrics when available
Move detail and background pages together; turn this off for a drawer-style rise with a gently receding background
Enable live background blur for the mini player and bottom bar on Android 13+
Enable adjustable live glass blur for top and bottom tabs and settings cards
For a better effect, use Enhanced Advanced Blur with a background image from Personalization.
If you do not have a membership, switching to lossless or higher quality may cause songs to fail playback.
The highest quality profile may cause songs to fail parsing unless the song natively supports Dolby.
Provide Lyricon and SuperLyric with the current song, playback state, position, word-level lyrics, and translations
When platform lyrics are not word-level, try matching word-level lyrics from the AMLL TTML database
When a Bluetooth device is connected, sync the current lyric line to the device song info area
Adjust external lyrics, Lyricon integration, and default lyric offsets
Default offset applied when loading Cloud Music lyrics
Default offset applied when loading QQ Music lyrics
Enable Meizu status bar lyrics (for select devices only)
Show lightweight floating lyrics on screen with custom style and position
The current lyric line appears here
Use the floating lyrics style during playback
Needs permission to display over other apps. Enabling opens the system permission page.
Hide floating lyrics while NeriPlayer is open to avoid covering the UI
Show translated lyrics on the second line when available
When enabled, lyric changes show the full line immediately. Long-line scrolling is not affected.
This will delete selected cache files and free up disk space.

If system shows much more than here, it's an Android cache issue.

Solutions:
1. Restart device
2. Wait for system update
3. Open system settings
Some temporary cache files could not be cleared
Downloads are active. Staging files can be cleared after downloads finish
Audio segments cached during playback and safe to stream again
Covers, avatars, and blurred background images that can be loaded again
Incomplete downloads, resume metadata, and HLS checkpoints
Temporary copies created when sharing local music
NetEase, Bili, and YouTube Music playlist detail cache
Files in the cache directory not covered above
Songs saved by the user. These are not removed by clearing cache
Original and translated lyric sidecar files for downloads. These are not removed by clearing cache
Download catalog, pending queue, and cancellation records
Debug logs and long-running log files
Crash, ANR, and native crash reports
Covers extracted or saved for imported local music
A managed copy of the selected app background image
Local playlists, favorite playlists, and frequent playlist records
Core playlists, favorites, settings, and auth data
Set to 0 MB to disable cache. Restart required after changing limit.
Export settings, sign-in state, and sync config
Restore settings, sign-in state, and sync config from a file
The config file includes sign-in credentials, auth cookies, tokens, and sync configuration. Use it only for personal migration and never share it with anyone.
The following items could not be fully restored
Language settings changed, so the page will refresh automatically
NetEase sign-in data did not pass validation and was skipped
Custom background image access is unavailable and was skipped
Download directory access is unavailable and was skipped
Some settings were unknown or invalid and were skipped or restored to a safe range
This may cause sync inconsistencies. Continue?
Wait at least %1$d minutes between automatic play history syncs
Clear sync configuration. Local data won\'t be deleted.
Repository format error, should be: owner/repo
Repository not found or no access: %s
GitHub Token expired or invalid, please reconfigure
Remote backup file is invalid or corrupted
Configure your WebDAV server, username, password, and initial path
The file will be saved as a file named neriplayer-sync.json and appended automatically.
Please enter the server URL, username, and password
WebDAV username or password is invalid
Remote WebDAV backup file is invalid or corrupted
Clear all WebDAV sync settings. Local data will not be deleted.
No playlist data in backup file
Incomplete GitHub sync configuration detected. Token may have expired or been deleted. Please reconfigure in settings.
Playlist renamed on both sides, using local name: %s
Playlist renamed on both sides, using remote name: %s
Silence regular background sync failure notifications. Token expiry will still notify.
Resetting the unique identity will invalidate the old identity and replace it with a new one. Continue?
Leave the room before resetting the unique identity.
Room closed because the controller did not return in time.
%1$s invites you to join room %2$s in NeriPlayer. Open the app after copying this message, or use the link below.
Do you want to join room %1$s?
Do you want to join %1$s\'s room %2$s?
Allow listeners to change tracks and seek.
Pause automatically when a member joins or leaves.
Send playable audio links to listeners when available.
The controller disabled member playback control.
The controller is offline. Try again after reconnection.
The controller is offline, so the playable link cannot be fetched.
Local playback is disabled while Listen Together is active.
Room credentials expired. Please join Listen Together again.
The room no longer exists or is unavailable.
Listen Together connection was interrupted. Reconnecting now.
Listen Together session expired. Rejoining the room now.
Inspect protocol state, room data, and WebSocket debug actions
Used to debug Listen Together demo Worker room state, WebSocket connectivity, and sync payloads.
This action is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
Configure the server address and unique identity
Leave this empty to use the built-in default server. Invite links will not include a server address.
A custom Listen Together server is active. Invite links will include the server address.
Leave empty to use the built-in default server
Invalid server address. Enter a full http:// or https:// address.
The invite contains an invalid server address, so this room cannot be joined.
Room ID only supports uppercase letters and digits.
Nickname only supports Chinese characters, letters, and digits.
Reverted to the built-in default server.
The built-in default server is reachable.
The custom Listen Together server is reachable.
The address responded, but it does not appear to be a valid Listen Together server.
Resetting will generate a new unique identity and invalidate the previous one.
View playback, download, and cache hit traffic, and manage mobile data risk prompts
Prompt high-risk actions on mobile data
Ask before downloading on mobile data or roaming; when Wi-Fi disconnects, choose whether to continue, wait for Wi-Fi, or cancel all tasks
Follow existing quality settings on mobile data
When enabled, mobile data and roaming continue using the platform quality settings above
Automatically use a lower traffic quality on mobile data or roaming
No traffic stats in this period yet
This will delete all Wi-Fi, mobile data, roaming, and cache hit stats.
You are using %1$s. Downloading “%2$s” may use a lot of data.
You are using %1$s. Downloading %2$d songs may use a lot of data.
You switched to %1$s. %2$d active download tasks are paused. Choose what to do next.
Please enable file logging in settings
Crash logs are automatically recorded when app crashes
The app crashed or stopped responding during the previous launch. A preview of the log is shown below.\nLog file: %1$s
The log is long, so only the first 64 KB is shown here. You can copy the full content or export the original file.
A crash or ANR was detected from the previous launch, so all app components were skipped.
Only log viewing, log export, config export, playlist export, Cookie cleanup, sign-in reset, settings reset, and normal startup recovery are available.
No abnormal exit log is available
Reads local config and playlist files without loading the full app. Export failures only show an error and keep safe mode open.
Clears WebView Cookies and the local NetEase, Bili, and YouTube sign-in states.
This will clear saved Cookies and web sign-in storage on this device. You will need to sign in again.
Cookies and sign-in states were reset
Restores all app settings to defaults without clearing sign-ins or Cookies.
This will clear saved app settings and rebuild startup snapshots. Sign-ins, Cookies, and account data will not be cleared.
Clears this crash marker and enters the full app again. If the issue still exists, safe mode will open again next time.
This will delete all local log files and cannot be undone.
Inspect USB Host permission, system audio outputs, and player routing
Call all and copy to clipboard

Debug YouTube Music APIs with the current signed-in session. Supports custom `hl/gl`, `browseId`, `videoId`, force refresh, and raw JSON output. Requests fall back to anonymous mode when not signed in.
Supports Home / Library / Browse / Player / Lyrics with raw JSON
YouTube auth cleared. Subsequent requests will use anonymous mode
Home Feed / library debug summary will appear here.
The parsed probe summary will appear here.
The raw JSON response will appear here.
Not signed in. Requests will use anonymous mode
YouTube sign-in detected | State: %1$s | Cookie keys: %2$d
View, copy and export runtime logs
Open the JVM, ANR, and native crash test menu
These options include recoverable exceptions, real crashes, and a deliberate not-responding fault.
Uses the existing exception dialog flow and does not intentionally kill the process.
Throws an uncaught exception on the main thread and exits the app immediately.
Throws an uncaught exception on a background thread to test the global crash chain.
Blocks the main thread for 16 seconds; only the system ANR result can decide whether safe mode opens next time.
Triggers a segmentation fault to verify native crash interception and file logging.
Calls abort to verify the native crash interceptor and system termination chain.
ANR testing is only available in debug builds.
Native crash testing is currently unavailable. Please make sure the native crash interceptor initialized successfully.
After hiding, \"Debug\" will be removed from bottom bar. Tap version 7 times in settings to re-enable
Get Stream by Page (Page %s, with resolved CID)
Get All Audio Streams by Page (Page %s, with resolved CID)
Get MP4 Direct URL by Page (Page %s, with resolved CID)
Click button to call API and copy raw JSON to clipboard:\\nIncludes: Account, UserId, Created Playlists, Subscribed Playlists, Liked Playlist ID, Lyrics(33894312); Excludes liked songs
Enter keyword, click platform button to call search API and copy raw JSON result to clipboard.
Not signed in. Some APIs will fail directly
Please enter a valid song ID
The NetEase API probe summary will appear here.
The raw JSON response will appear here.
(No preview, enter keyword and click button above~)
OK, [%s] search complete and copied to clipboard
OK, all APIs called and copied to clipboard
OK, all APIs called and copied
Please enter valid avid (number) in BV field
This is a test exception to verify exception handler functionality
No playback data yet\nStart listening to see your stats here
No playback stats in this period yet
This older sync data only has total stats, not daily buckets\nUpdate the old device and sync again
This period is shown in legacy compatibility mode and only includes stats that can be restored exactly
Are you sure you want to clear all playback statistics? This cannot be undone.
This software (NeriPlayer) is a cross-platform audio/video player tool that only provides technical framework and playback functions. It does not store or provide any audio/video content.

All playable content is accessed by users from third-party platforms. Copyright belongs to the original content providers. This software assumes no responsibility for the legality, accuracy, or availability of third-party platform content.
Users must comply with local laws and regulations and third-party platform terms of service, and assume all legal responsibilities arising from using this software to access third-party content.

This software may integrate third-party platform APIs or services, which are subject to their respective terms of service and privacy policies. Users should understand and agree to third-party policies when using related functions.

This software does not collect any personal information, does not track user behavior, and does not transmit user data to any third party. All user data (such as play history, favorites) is stored only on the user\'s device or in cloud storage services chosen by the user.

This software is provided \"as is\" without any express or implied warranties. The developer assumes no responsibility for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of this software.
Users must ensure their use of this software complies with local laws and regulations. Some features may be unavailable due to regional policy differences.
This statement may be updated from time to time, and the updated version will be published in the software. Continued use of this software indicates acceptance of the updated terms.
By using this software, you indicate that you have read, understood, and agreed to all content on this page. If you do not agree, please stop using and uninstall this software immediately.
Pick your language, connect platforms, then tune the UI and background.
The next screens will use this language.
It refreshes right away and moves to the next step.
Connect the ones you use most so it is easier to find what you want.
You can skip this for now and sign in or import Cookies later in settings.
Back up playlists to your own private GitHub repository.
GitHub sync is optional too, and you can finish it later in settings.
Set the UI scale and background now, and they will apply in the main screen.
Preview is about %1$d%% right now. Drag to see the change.
Pick a background, then adjust blur and opacity if you want.
Background, corners, and layering update here as you adjust them.
You will go straight into the app after this, and you can still adjust everything later.

NeriPlayer is a cross-platform audio and video player. It helps users organize and play publicly available content from third-party platforms. NeriPlayer does not upload, distribute, modify, or host audio/video files, and it does not store user content or third-party content on developer-controlled servers. Downloads are saved only to the user\'s device for offline playback. Downloaded files do not pass through the developer\'s servers and are not synced or backed up by NeriPlayer.
Playable content is accessed by users from third-party platforms. Copyright and related rights remain with the original creators or platforms.
Users must comply with the laws and regulations of their country or region.
NeriPlayer may save supported third-party audio/video content to the user\'s local device, but it does not upload, sync, or store those files on any server.
Do not use NeriPlayer to infringe third-party content rights.
Users are responsible for confirming that the content they access or download comes from a lawful source and that they have the necessary rights to use it.
The developer does not guarantee the legality, accuracy, availability, or continued accessibility of third-party platform content.
Any legal risk arising from user actions, including downloading, sharing, or distributing content, is the user\'s responsibility.
Some features rely on third-party platform APIs or services.
The developer does not guarantee the stability, compatibility, timeliness, or continued availability of third-party services.
Users should review and comply with each platform\'s terms of use and privacy policy.
NeriPlayer does not collect personally identifiable information.
NeriPlayer does not collect device identifiers or device information.
NeriPlayer does not track behavior, analyze usage, or build user profiles.
Playback history, search history, and similar records are kept locally.
When a user starts a download, the file is saved only to local storage and is not sent to the developer or any third party.
NeriPlayer does not include third-party analytics, crash reporting, or advertising SDKs.
Access logs created by third-party platforms are handled by those platforms under their own privacy policies.
GitHub Sync (optional): users may back up playlist data to their own private GitHub repository. Tokens are encrypted with Android Keystore and stored locally, so the developer cannot access them.
NeriPlayer is provided "as is" without warranties, including warranties of stability or uninterrupted availability.
To the extent permitted by law, the developer is not liable for losses arising from use of the app, including download-related actions.
The above limitations apply even if the developer has been advised of the possibility of such losses.
Users are responsible for ensuring that their use of the app, including any downloads, complies with the laws of their jurisdiction.
The developer may update this disclaimer and privacy statement from time to time. Continued use of the app means you accept the updated terms.
By using NeriPlayer, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to this page. If you do not agree, please stop using the app and uninstall it.
No Cookie found, please confirm login
Cannot get user ID, please log in again
If problem persists, please restart app or contact developer.
This is a test exception to verify exception handler
